# neilkodner.com

Photography portfolio site. No build step — HTML/CSS/JS edited directly, deployed via GitHub Pages.

## Development

Open files directly in a browser or use any local HTTP server (e.g. `python3 -m http.server`). There is no compile step, no package.json, no node_modules.

## Auto-generated files — do not edit

- `catalog.json` — generated by GitHub Actions every 30 min from the R2 bucket; any manual edits will be overwritten
- `_thumbs/` in R2 — generated by `scripts/build_catalog.py`; do not upload or edit manually

## Deployment

Pushing to `main` triggers a GitHub Pages rebuild. The site is live at neilkodner.com within ~1 minute.

## Content pipeline

Photos are uploaded to Cloudflare R2 via iPad (Lightroom Mobile export → S3 app). The GitHub Action (`update-catalog.yml`) picks them up automatically — no git involvement needed for adding photos.

## Secrets

R2 credentials live in GitHub repository secrets. They are not in the repo and should never be committed.
